title: Minimum One Bit Operations To Make Integers Zero
description: Return the minimum operations to turn n into zero when bit 0 may flip anytime and bit i may flip only if bit i-1 is 1 and all lower bits are 0. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: n: int. 0 <= n <=1e9; bit positions are zero-indexed; return an integer operation count.
output_contract: Return integer using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
